item.title: There is a concerning lack of this post being stolen

item.title:

The gap between demos and real apps is finally clos...
item.description:
RT @fffiloni: Gradio just unleashed the horses.
The gap between demos and real apps is finally closing.

--- @_akhaliq | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 3 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
